calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-02-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:02am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk- Julie Rumsey, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Amaline Bassetti, appears in Pro Per. Respondent Katheryn Malkowych, appears in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

EXHR: Group A) Timeline of occurences with landlord; Text messages screen pictures from cell phone; emails from Gmail account; Copies of letters.

EXHA: Group 1) Copy of Sub-Lease Agreement; Emails; Letters

10:28am

Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-05-2012 Judgment Entered
